overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza featuring massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air between neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene from Cyberpunk 2077 shows Night City's iconic city center with its characteristic blend of high-tech architecture, vibrant digital signage, and animated holographic art installations hovering above a circular plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display

events.description: holographic orange koi fish enters view from the right side, beginning its arc across the plaza
orange hologram passes overhead reaching maximum apparent size before beginning descent to left

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from elevated position overlooking the plaza, slowly panning to track the holographic display

entered.detail: circular structure with glowing cyan blue neon lights forming concentric rings
large translucent orange-gold holographic fish with flowing fins swimming through the air
large translucent blue holographic fish swimming in the background behind the orange fish
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and vertical neon light strips
tall building facade covered in bright digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by a circular fountain structure glowing with cyan neon light. A massive orange holographic koi fish enters from the right, swimming through the air above the plaza while a blue holographic fish remains visible in the background. The surrounding skyscrapers display vibrant neon signage against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display

events.description: orange holographic fish exits to the left as blue fish becomes the dominant visual element
blue holographic koi reaches center frame, appearing to swim directly toward the camera position

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation, tracking the transition from orange to blue holographic fish

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic fish completes its pass and moves to the left background while the blue holographic koi takes prominence, swimming from the background toward the right foreground. The camera maintains its elevated perspective on the neon-lit plaza as the two massive holograms effectively swap positions in the frame, creating a dynamic aerial display above the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display

events.description: orange holographic koi re-enters from the right side, beginning another circuit around the plaza
blue fish completes its arc to the left while orange fish crosses the center, creating a crossing pattern

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary elevated viewpoint, observing the continuous circular swimming pattern of both holographic fish

segments.scene_description: The blue holographic fish moves to the left background while the orange fish re-enters from the right, completing the circular display pattern. Both massive holograms continue their perpetual swimming motion around the neon-lit plaza, with the orange fish now dominating the right side of the frame as it prepares for another pass overhead. The surrounding cyberpunk cityscape remains constant with its towering glass structures and vibrant digital signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous elevated perspective of a cyberpunk plaza as massive holographic koi fish perform a rhythmic, circular dance amidst a neon-lit cityscape. It begins with a focus on a cyan-glowing circular fountain while a giant orange holographic fish glides through the air from the right, accompanied by a blue counterpart in the distance. As the orange fish recedes into the left background, the blue koi takes prominence, swimming forward toward the right foreground to swap positions in a dynamic aerial display. The scene then shifts as the blue fish drifts away to the left, allowing the orange fish to re-emerge from the right and complete its perpetual loop. This fluid motion continues against a constant backdrop of towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant digital signage that illuminate the dark night sky.
